entry.title: New: Bill 77 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AUTHORIZING THE MAYOR TO ENTER INTO AN INTERGOVERNMENTAL AGREEMENT WITH THE FEDERAL EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT AGENCY AUTHORIZING THE USE OF COUNTY PROPERTY FOR A TEMPORARY HOUSING PROJECT" The purpose of this bill is FEMA is proposing to install 4 temporary housing units on County property, located at 767 Luakini Street, Lahaina, which was the former site of Countyʻs Crossroads Apartments.

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
